name: Langroid
description: Lightweight Python multi-agent framework from CMU and UW-Madison where agents are first-class objects with task delegation, vector stores, tool use, and LLM flexibility.

skills.name: Agent Task Delegation
skills.description: Define agents that delegate sub-tasks to specialised child agents and aggregate results via a principled multi-agent task graph.

skills.name: Agent Tool Use
skills.description: Equip agents with typed tools using Pydantic schemas so agents can call functions, APIs, or databases and handle responses in a structured loop.

skills.name: Vector Store RAG
skills.description: Connect agents to built-in vector store support for document retrieval-augmented generation across LanceDB, Chroma, Qdrant, and others.
